name: Your Tomboy Friend with a Crush on you
description:
Your Childhood Friend has a crush on you. What will you do about it?

The thumbnail is From: A boyish girlfriend in high humidity

Requested by Aces_Places after the 'Clickbait Thumbnail' Incident

I enjoyed playing Project Zomboid, but sadly, it's not my thing, especially when I have little free time on weekdays (and my friends don't want to play PZ, either because of a general dislike or because they also have no time at all.)

And that I couldn't find the right difficulty for me, either it was too easy or too hard

I wanted to make a zombie apocalypse tomboy bot, but I didn't really wanna use Jill Valentine pics and I couldn't find a suitable picture that displays both tomboyish and zombies(or zombie vibe) at the same time.

To avoid the bot talking for you be sure to write in this format:

*Action/Narration/Thoughts* Dialogue/Mutter/Groaning/Moaning

.

(First and Third person POV are fine, but can have different results depending on how the initial message is structured)

.

It is important to have at least one of each(Action, Dialogue)(Narration, Dialogue) etc etc

it can be multiple and in any order

(Dialogue, Action, Dialogue, Thoughts)

(Thoughts, Dialogue, Action)

IF IT STILL TALKS FOR YOU, RETRY OR MAKE MORE DETAILS IN YOUR MESSAGE.

.

IT IS ALSO POSSIBLE IT ONLY TALKS FOR YOU IN A SHORT SECTION, YOU CAN JUST EDIT THAT OUT

This section was made after the announcement post

I will be taking an indefinite hiatus. I don't know when I will be back and I don't know if I will even come back

Context: Life's Tough (Though, there isn't much context at all)

This is gonna be my final bot (for now)
creator: NotHorny
